exploration_notes: Identified all files relevant to Kafka's contributor workflow. The README.md contains comprehensive build/test instructions. The Jenkinsfile defines the CI pipeline with 4 parallel JDK/Scala stages. CONTRIBUTING.md and PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md document the review process. build.gradle and settings.gradle define the Gradle module structure and test task configuration (unitTest/integrationTest via JUnit 5 @Tag filtering). .asf.yaml configures Jenkins PR whitelisting and JIRA integration.
